_meta.purpose: Medical-domain Egyptian Arabic sentiment lexicon. Built by filtering ALL_lex.csv (1913 terms) and enriching with clinical terms. Used by SentimentAnalyzer for offline zero-latency scoring.
_meta.author: Goda Emad (AI Core) + Mohamed Gharieb (Medical Content)
_meta.schema: term | weight [-1.0 to 1.0] | trigger | urgency_override | source | context_tags

emergency_triggers._note: Any single match escalates immediately to UrgencyMode.EMERGENCY — no further scoring needed

intensifiers._note: Multiply weight of nearest term. Egyptian post-position: intensifier comes AFTER term (right window 4 tokens). جداً works both sides.

negation_markers._note: Left window 4 tokens — flip polarity of next sentiment term. ما…ش circumfix detected via prefix ما + token ending in ش.

duration_terms._note: Parsed by CommandParser._extract_duration() into integer days.

anchors.note: most common Egyptian anchor — بقالي 3 أيام

pregnancy_module._note: Loaded ONLY when intent=PREGNANCY or patient_context.is_pregnant=true

school_health_module._note: Loaded ONLY when intent=SCHOOL_HEALTH or patient_context.is_student=true

priority_order: 1. emergency_triggers — any match → EMERGENCY immediately, stop all scoring
2. pregnancy_module or school_health_module — only when intent matches
6. Apply intensifiers: RIGHT window 4 tokens (أوي، خالص، ناري...)
7. Apply negation_markers: LEFT window 4 tokens — flip polarity
loading_instructions.cold_start_rule: If no ML model available: use emergency_triggers + negative_severe only. Guarantees patient safety with zero ML dependencies.

source_mapping.ALL_lex: Terms validated from ALL_lex.csv (1913 terms) — general Arabic sentiment
source_mapping.medical: Clinically added terms — Egyptian medical dialect not in ALL_lex
source_mapping.LABR_lex: Emotional distress terms from book reviews — map well to patient language
source_mapping.RES_lex: Service dissatisfaction terms repurposed for healthcare quality feedback
